raw_text:
```json
{
  "claims": [
    "Legislation AB 2112 aims to create an Office of Suicide Prevention in California.",
    "The proposal focuses on reducing suicides among vulnerable groups, including adolescents, older adults, veterans, and LGBTQ individuals.",
    "More than 4,000 Californians die by suicide every year according to the strategic plan's research.",
    "Suicide is the second leading cause of death among young people ages 15-24.",
    "According to a 2017 CDC study, 1 in 6 high school students seriously considered ending their lives.",
    "More than 1 in 12 high school students reported attempting suicide.",
    "In 2014, 3,575 children aged 5-20 were hospitalized for non-fatal self-inflicted injuries in California."
  ]
}
```
